response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has virtually no demonstrated experience with C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443, which are core to the role; their recent work is centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ exposure from 2014–2015.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Strong background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community initiatives
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial automation protocols, MQTT, or IEC 62443 standards
Current role and projects are focused on web/cloud stacks, not on-premises high-performance systems
